Workflows

Create your first automation — trigger on a schedule or when an email arrives.

New Workflow

Step 1 of 3 — Name your workflow

When should this run?

schedule
On a schedule
Daily, weekly, or any cron expression
check_circle
mail
When an email arrives
Polled every 2 min via Gmail IMAP — filter by sender or subject
check_circle
play_arrow
Manual trigger only
Run it yourself from this page whenever you want
check_circle

Quick schedule presets

Leave blank to fire on any new email.

Requires Gmail App Password. Set GMAIL_USER + GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD in Settings → OpenClaw.

What should happen?

send
Telegram notification
Send a message to your Telegram chat
check_circle

Use {from}, {subject}, {snippet} for email data. Leave blank for default format.

hub
Ask ARIA to respond
ARIA processes the event and sends you a response via Telegram
check_circle

ARIA will use her tools and reply to you. Use {from}, {subject} for context.
